expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: In result.md, section "1) Scope of this checkpoint (what must be explicitly covered)" explicitly enumerates all four required focus areas: (1) Prompt lifecycle, (2) Template flow, (3) Builder loading, (4) Close or save decision safety. It also reiterates these in section 3 "Coverage determination".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md states "Primary phase under test: phase5b (checkpoint enforcement)" and frames the entire assessment as "Phase5b Shipment Checkpoint (Blind, Pre‑Defect)". Section 3 is titled "Phase5b checkpoint enforcement assessment" and section 5 says it is limited to phase5b checkpoint enforcement.
